mapper.select: SELECT * FROM annual_goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY priority DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM annual_goal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year = #{year} ORDER BY priority DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM annual_goal ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE annual_goal SET year = #{year}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, progress = #{progress}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, priority = #{priority} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE annual_goal SET progress = #{progress} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE annual_goal SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
